title: Assistant Store Manager - Starbucks India International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Starbucks India International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Starbucks India International Enterprises in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Starbucks India International Enterprises:
Starbucks India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
